name: Inworld AI
tagline: Create AI-powered NPCs with natural voice and personality
description: Inworld AI is the #1 ranked platform for building AI-driven non-player characters with sub-200ms latency voice, memory, and dynamic personalities. It integrates natively with Unreal and Unity engines, allowing characters to be aware of their surroundings and generate surprisingly natural conversations from backstory and emotional profiles.
creator: Inworld AI

name: Convai
tagline: Conversational AI that brings game characters to life
description: Convai provides a conversational AI service designed for games, metaverse, and XR experiences. It enables developers to create NPCs with natural language understanding, emotional responses, and in-game actions that respond dynamically to player interactions.
creator: Convai Inc.

name: Charisma.ai
tagline: AI-powered interactive storytelling engine for games
description: Charisma.ai is an interactive storytelling platform that uses an emotional engine and branching narrative AI to create immersive dialogue experiences. It powers dynamic characters in games, training simulations, and educational tools with real-time story adaptation based on player choices.
creator: Charisma Entertainment

name: Ludo.ai
tagline: AI-powered game concept and asset generation platform
description: Ludo.ai helps game developers generate ideas, concepts, sprites, and video clips using AI. From text prompts to animated clips, it offers a comprehensive suite of tools tailored for the gaming industry including game concept generation, image generation, and sprite creation.
creator: Ludo.ai

name: Meshy AI
tagline: Generate production-ready 3D models from text and images
description: Meshy AI is the #1 AI 3D model generator that creates production-ready 3D models from text prompts and images in seconds. It's widely used by game developers and 3D artists for rapid prototyping and asset creation, supporting multiple export formats for game engines.
creator: Meshy Inc.

name: Scenario
tagline: AI creative infrastructure for game art production
description: Scenario is a creative AI infrastructure platform trusted by 15,000+ customers for generating consistent game art assets. It allows teams to train custom models on their own art style, automate production workflows, and scale asset creation 10x faster with full IP governance.
creator: Scenario

name: modl.ai
tagline: AI agents that test your game while you sleep
description: modl.ai uses AI agents and analysts to automate game testing and QA, finding bugs, glitches, and performance issues faster than human testers. No SDKs or code integration required — upload a build, define tests in plain language, and get detailed bug reports with severity scores.
creator: modl.ai

name: HouseCanary CanaryAI
tagline: AI-powered property valuations and market intelligence
description: HouseCanary's CanaryAI delivers instant property valuations, predictive analytics, and detailed neighborhood insights for real estate professionals. It features AI-driven property condition analysis from listing photos, off-market lead generation, and automated valuation models (AVMs) for competitive pricing.
creator: HouseCanary

name: EliseAI
tagline: Agentic AI for multifamily housing leasing and management
description: EliseAI is an industry-leading AI platform for multifamily housing that automates leasing, resident communication, and property management. Its conversational AI agents handle prospect inquiries 24/7, schedule tours, follow up on leads, and manage maintenance requests, significantly reducing costs while improving conversion rates.
creator: EliseAI

name: Restb.ai
tagline: Computer vision and image recognition for real estate
description: Restb.ai provides AI-powered computer vision technology specifically for real estate, converting property photos into structured, standardized data. Its image recognition identifies property features, room types, conditions, and potential issues from listing photos, enabling automated quality scoring and data enrichment for MLS platforms.
creator: Restb.ai

name: Saleswise
tagline: AI-powered CMAs, marketing, and virtual room remodels
description: Saleswise is an AI-powered tool that streamlines creating comparative market analyses, writing professional emails, and visualizing room transformations. It helps real estate agents serve clients faster with data-backed pricing, virtual remodels to help clients visualize updates, and live market data integration.
creator: Saleswise

name: Lofty
tagline: AI-enhanced CRM for real estate pipeline optimization
description: Lofty is an AI-enhanced CRM tailored for real estate professionals focusing on client relationship management and pipeline optimization. It features AI-powered lead scoring, automated follow-up sequences, predictive analytics for client behavior, and smart task prioritization to help agents close deals faster.
creator: Lofty

name: Pando Pi
tagline: AI teams for autonomous freight procurement and logistics
description: Pando Pi launched in February 2025 as AI-powered teams for logistics, enabling autonomous freight procurement, planning, and payments for global brands. Its AI agents eliminate manual work in transportation management, freight procurement, and supply chain optimization using a proprietary supply chain knowledge graph.
creator: Pando

name: MarkIt
tagline: AI agents for global trade compliance and tariff management
description: MarkIt is a YC-backed startup (founded 2025) building AI agents that work inside trade professionals' existing workflows — Excel, PDFs, and broker portals. It automates tariff classification, ACE report audits, and maintains a self-updating system of record for global trade compliance, helping companies navigate the increasingly complex tariff landscape.
creator: MarkIt

name: Prodensus
tagline: Agentic AI platform for freight data and RFP management
description: Prodensus is an Irish AI-native startup revolutionizing freight management with its agentic AI platform that cleans and processes freight RFPs in minutes. Partnered with SONAR and backed by Microsoft Azure, it helps freight brokers win more business by automating RFP responses, data analysis, and emissions reporting.
creator: Prodensus

name: Saudara AI
tagline: AI broker connecting American brands with vetted overseas factories
description: Saudara AI is a YC-backed AI broker (founded 2026) that connects American brands with vetted overseas factories, fixing the broken international sourcing process. US brands import over $3 trillion in goods annually and lose billions to ghost suppliers and hidden fees — Saudara AI's AI handles sourcing 10x faster at a fraction of the cost.
creator: Saudara AI

name: Mastery Logistics
tagline: AI-powered logistics automation for food supply chains
description: Mastery Logistics Systems was named a 2025 Top Tech Startup by Food Logistics and Supply & Demand Chain Executive. Its AI-powered automation platform streamlines food supply chain operations, reducing waste and improving efficiency across procurement, inventory management, and distribution workflows.
creator: Mastery Logistics Systems

name: GETASAP
tagline: AI-driven fresh produce distribution with same-day delivery
description: GETASAP rebuilds fresh produce distribution around real demand and fast execution using AI. It uses micro-fulfillment centers and analyzes live retail sales, purchasing, and waste patterns to decide what to source, where to place inventory, and when to replenish — delivering wholesale produce with 8-hour same-day delivery.
creator: GETASAP
